description: Two-column contact section: left column shows quick-contact cards (WhatsApp, email, address-with-map, phone) plus social icons; right column hosts the contact form rendered by the forms extension. The form itself (fields, labels, validation, success state) is owned by the forms extension and configured via the 'contact' form slug — only the framing copy lives in this block.

fields.description: Quick-contact tiles shown in the left column. The 'pin' card additionally renders a map placeholder and an hours line; other icons render as a single line of label + value.
Pick the icon. 'pin' triggers the address-with-map variant; everything else is a compact single-line card.
fields.name: icon
fields.title: Icon

fields.description: The phone number, email, or street address shown in display font.
fields.name: value
fields.title: Primary value

fields.description: Optional opening-hours line rendered under the map on the address card. Leave empty for non-address cards.
fields.name: hours
fields.title: Hours line (HTML allowed, only used by the 'pin' card)

fields.name: contact_cards
fields.title: Contact cards

fields.description: The title displayed above the contact form (e.g. 'Drop us a line.').
fields.name: form_heading
fields.title: Form heading

fields.description: Small text shown below the form title (e.g. 'We reply in the order we receive').
fields.name: form_subheading
fields.title: Form subheading

name: Contact Form Grid

test_data.form_subheading: We reply in the order we receive.
